name: RedDoorz Syariah near RSUD Zainoel Abidin Banda Aceh

reviews.reviewComments: Saya tinggal 1 malam disini, dan ini adalah hotel dengan harga terbaik, lokasinya juga dekat dengan kota, dan ada banyak toko makanan radius 100m.

reviews.reviewPositives: Location is good and worth the price
reviews.reviewNegatives: so many mosquitoes in the area. even there were some in my room. hopefully the hotel provides insect repellant fot the guests

reviews.originalComment: Belum pernah menginap selain rukajs sndiri, dan ini pengalaman yg layak. Ruangan seperti di foto properti. Bagus
reviews.reviewComments: Never stayed anywhere else besides my own lodging, and this is a worthwhile experience. The room looks like the property photo. Nice.

reviews.reviewPositives: Très basique mais très bien pour une nuit ou deux. confortable.
reviews.reviewNegatives: pas dévier dans la salle de bain

reviews.originalComment: Sangat recomended untuk yg mau bepergian terus nginap di daerah kota dgn harga yg affordable. Ditambah penginapannya juga tersedia water heater di setiap kamarnya. Kalo mau makan tinggal jalan 5 laingkah ke depan udah bisa makan di bukulah.
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended for those who want to travel and stay in the city at an affordable price. Additionally, the accommodation also has a water heater in each room. If you want to eat, just walk 5 steps ahead and you can eat at Bukulah.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Die Inhaber waren sehr freundlich und haben mir angeboten mich zum Fährhafen zu fahren. 
Die Unterkunft war nur als Zwischenstation gedacht.
AC hat gut funktioniert 👍🏻
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Ein neuer Anstrich würde das Zimmer etwas behaglicher machen. 
Das Bett war eine Zumutung. Nicht weil es unbequem, sondern weil es einfach schmutzig war. 
Das nächste mal buche ich besseren Standard. Bin mir nicht sicher, ob die guten Bewertungen hier wirklich gerechtfertigt sind...

reviews.originalComment: Cocok sih untuk harga segitu, lumayan bersih, cuma di sepreinya ada beberapa noda. Tp plusnya ada water heaternya👍
reviews.reviewComments: It's suitable for that price, quite clean, but there are some stains on the sheets. The plus side is that there is a water heater. 👍

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih, fasilitasnya lumanyan lengkap, tapi kebetulannya dapat kamar yang AC nya kurang dingin. Rekomended
reviews.reviewComments: The room was clean, the facilities were quite complete, but I happened to get a room where the air conditioning was not cool enough. Recommended.

reviews.reviewTitle: The staff is not stand by and bad parking management
reviews.reviewComments: We stay in period of natal and new year holiday, which is maybe more visitor to stay. The staff was not stand by in recepcionist, so when we have to wait about 30-45 minutes until the staff coming and check in. The parking management is also bad, there is no rule / guidance how to enter / exit when the parking lot is full of car

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar kotor, kamar mandi kotor, seprei banyak bercak dan bau tampaknya tidak di ganti. Lalu saat datang tidak ada resepsionis sehingga harus di telpon dahulu dan tidak ramah.

Jika ada pilihan hotel lain mending ke hotel lain yaa teman teman
reviews.reviewComments:
Dirty room, dirty bathroom, sheets with many stains and a smell that seems to not have been changed. Then upon arrival, there was no receptionist, so we had to call first and they were not friendly.

If there are other hotel options, it's better to go to another hotel, friends.

Ngga mewah, tapi nyaman. Cari makan juga dekat, ada parkiran.
Staf ramah.  Worth it

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya luas dan bersih, AC nya dingin. Fasilitas ok. Staf juga ramah. Rekomended
reviews.reviewComments: The room is spacious and clean, the AC is cool. The facilities are okay. The staff is also friendly. Recommended.

reviews.reviewNegatives:
No sink, no soap, no body wash.

Rat faeces all over the bathroom

Mouldy bathroom 

Stained and burnt bed sheets

No receptionist and no English spoken. 

Lumpy pillows

Inefficient AC

Lazy staff.

reviews.reviewComments: Basically cheap but great, you know.

reviews.reviewPositives: Good WiFi and Location is near to the town

reviews.reviewComments: Pas bgt saya yg solo trip, tempatnya bersih lokasi juga nyaman tdk berisik...
Facilities are in line with the price.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk harga yang lumayan murah penginapan ini sangat nyaman.
reviews.reviewComments: For a quite affordable price, this accommodation is very comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan yg jauh dari kebisingan cocok utk istirahat
reviews.reviewComments: Accommodations that are far from noise are suitable for resting.

reviews.originalComment: Walau tempat agak tersembunyi di gang, tp Lo uar biasa bisa mendapatkan ke nyamanan istirahat dengan harga murah
reviews.reviewComments: Even though the place is somewhat hidden in an alley, you can extraordinarily find comfort for resting at a low price.

reviews.originalComment: Termurah dan terbaik dengan kebersihan dan kenyamanan yang luar biasa
reviews.reviewComments: The cheapest and the best with extraordinary cleanliness and comfort.
ac panas dan tidak dingin
